steps.title: Tie the play to the venue
steps.content: The passage says Sleep No More's narrative fragmentation hinges on the venue's immense, intricate layout. That means the performance space is central to the production's effect.

steps.title: Infer transfer difficulty
steps.content: A speculates about earlier venues, B turns intentional incompleteness into disappointment, and D invents a recommended itinerary. A production that depends on a particular layout would be hard to reproduce exactly elsewhere. The answer is C.
